_comment: Alchemist-surfaced suggestions catalog — cross-backend tool combos and pre-written /cast prompts, grouped by the three focus profiles (finance / governance / design) from focus-profiles.json. A combo's `chain` lists namespaced `serverId/toolName` tools in execution order; the alchemist's value is in combos spanning >1 backend. `verified:true` means EVERY tool in the chain lives on a server that was connected on the live gateway when this catalog was generated (ch1tty v4.1.0, 9/18 servers connected: evidence, browser-rendering, notion, github, context7, thinking, fs, playwright, orchestrator). `verified:false` means the chain references at least one config-present-but-not-connected server — those tools are plausible per each backend's known source surface but were NOT enumerated live. Prompts are pre-written natural-language intents a user can fire via ch1tty/cast; `resolves_to` names the combo (or a single tool) the cast should land on. This is a data artifact only — no loader, no 6th public tool. Updated 2026-05-29 to add cross-backend combos for the four new apps/*-mcp focused surfaces: tasks (tasks-mcp PR #56), ledger (ledger-mcp PR #57), session (session-coordinator-mcp PR #58), chittyevidence (evidence-mcp PR #59). All new-backend combos are verified:false (backends are in config as enabled:false pending token config).

generatedFrom.newBackendsNote: tasks/ledger/session/chittyevidence are apps/*-mcp scaffolds (PRs #56-59); tool names sourced from src/index.ts; combos are plausible per source surface but unverified (backends disabled pending token config)

finance.description: Billing, payments, and financial ecosystem tools — now extended with the append-only ChittyLedger (ledger-mcp) and ChittyAgent Tasks (tasks-mcp) for immutable audit trails and billing workflow tracking. NOTE: stripe, tasks, and ledger backends were NOT connected on the live gateway at generation time — combos involving them are verified:false. Stripe tool names follow the @stripe/mcp surface and are plausible but unverified.

combos.name: invoice-to-ledger-tracker
combos.accomplishes: Pull recent Stripe invoices and write each into a Notion finance tracker database as a page — turning billing state into a queryable, human-readable ledger view.
combos.notes: stripe not connected (lazy); stripe/list_invoices inferred from @stripe/mcp surface. notion/API-post-page is verified.

combos.name: new-customer-onboarding-record
combos.accomplishes: Create a Stripe customer, log the customer record into Notion, and open a GitHub issue to track onboarding follow-up work — a three-backend chain spanning payments, docs, and engineering.
combos.notes: stripe inferred (not connected). notion/API-post-page and github/create_issue verified.

combos.name: payment-failure-triage
combos.accomplishes: Enumerate failed/pending Stripe payment intents, reason over likely causes and remediation order with sequential-thinking, then record the triage plan as a Notion page.
combos.notes: stripe inferred. thinking/sequentialthinking and notion/API-post-page verified.

combos.name: invoice-to-immutable-ledger
combos.accomplishes: Pull recent Stripe invoices and append each as an immutable entry to the ChittyLedger — creating an auditable, append-only financial record that cannot be altered after the fact.
combos.notes: stripe inferred (not connected). ledger/append_entry from apps/ledger-mcp — in config (enabled:false). This is the core finance-immutability combo: Stripe is the source of truth for billing; the ledger is the durable audit anchor.

combos.name: billing-task-and-ledger
combos.accomplishes: Create a billing remediation task in ChittyAgent Tasks and simultaneously append a ledger entry recording the intent — so the task's existence is anchored in the immutable ledger before it can be lost or modified.
combos.notes: tasks/create_task from apps/tasks-mcp (enabled:false). ledger/append_entry from apps/ledger-mcp (enabled:false). Both are new apps/*-mcp surfaces — shortest cross-backend finance combo.

combos.name: ledger-to-finance-brief
combos.accomplishes: Pull recent ChittyLedger entries for a financial namespace, reason over them with sequential-thinking to identify anomalies or trends, and write a finance brief into Notion — turning raw ledger state into an actionable narrative.
combos.notes: ledger/list_entries from apps/ledger-mcp (enabled:false). thinking/sequentialthinking and notion/API-post-page are verified on the live gateway.

prompts.text: Pull this month's Stripe invoices and log them into my Notion finance tracker
Onboard a new Stripe customer and open a GitHub issue to track their setup
Triage my failed Stripe payments and write up a remediation plan in Notion
List all open Stripe subscriptions
Pull Stripe invoices and append each to the immutable ledger for audit
Create a billing task and lock in the intent on the ledger before it can be lost
Analyze recent ledger entries for anomalies and write a finance brief in Notion

governance.description: ChittyOS ecosystem governance, identity, evidence, and persistent state — now extended with ChittyAgent Tasks (tasks-mcp), ChittyLedger (ledger-mcp), Session Coordinator (session-mcp), and ChittyEvidence canonical document store (chittyevidence). Verified-strong combos remain: notion, evidence (AutoRAG), github, and thinking are live. New-backend combos (tasks/ledger/session/chittyevidence) are verified:false.

combos.name: rag-evidence-to-notion-brief
combos.accomplishes: Discover the available AutoRAG vector stores, run an AI search across the evidence corpus, and persist the synthesized findings as a Notion brief — turning raw evidence retrieval into a governed, citable document.
combos.notes: All three tools on connected servers (evidence, notion).

combos.name: issue-triage-to-governance-tracker
combos.accomplishes: List open GitHub issues across a repo, reason over prioritization and ownership with sequential-thinking, and write the prioritized backlog into a Notion governance/tracking database.
combos.notes: github, thinking, notion all connected.

combos.name: skill-discover-and-execute
combos.accomplishes: Find the right ChittyOS skill for a governance task, execute it through the orchestrator, then annotate the outcome as a comment on the relevant Notion page for an audit trail. Spans orchestrator + notion.
combos.notes: orchestrator and notion connected. (skill_search→skill_execute is same-backend, but the notion annotation makes the full chain cross-backend.)

combos.name: context-provisioning-audit
combos.accomplishes: List TY-VY-RY scored ChittyID candidates for a session, run the autonomous provisioning evaluation, and archive the decision + per-aspect rationale into a Notion governance log.
combos.notes: orchestrator and notion connected.

combos.name: agent-route-and-document
combos.accomplishes: Find which ChittyAgent handles a domain task, route the request through the orchestrator's agent protocol, and append the result to an existing Notion page's body.
combos.notes: orchestrator and notion connected.

combos.name: evidence-backed-issue
combos.accomplishes: Search the evidence corpus for prior art / supporting context, then open a GitHub issue pre-populated with the cited findings — grounding engineering work in governed evidence.
combos.notes: evidence and github connected.

combos.name: task-session-evidence
combos.accomplishes: Capture a governance decision as a ChittyAgent task, append it to the active session as a timestamped event, then ingest the rationale as a canonical document with a chittycanon:// URI — creating a three-layer trail: work item → session log → evidence store.
combos.notes: tasks, session, chittyevidence all in config (enabled:false). All three are new apps/*-mcp surfaces. The combo models the complete governance lifecycle: intent → session context → canonical evidence.

combos.name: session-audit-to-notion
combos.accomplishes: List all active governance sessions, enumerate the events in each, reason over the event stream to identify patterns or anomalies, and render a session audit trail into Notion for human review.
combos.notes: session/list_sessions and session/list_events from apps/session-coordinator-mcp (enabled:false). thinking and notion are verified live.

combos.name: evidence-to-task-to-ledger
combos.accomplishes: Search the canonical evidence store for a governance topic, create follow-up action tasks from the findings, and append the decision to the immutable ledger — a full discover → act → record governance chain.
combos.notes: chittyevidence, tasks, ledger all in config (enabled:false). This is the high-value three-backend governance combo: evidence informs tasks; ledger anchors the decision.

combos.name: ledger-review-to-brief
combos.accomplishes: Audit the governance ledger namespace for a topic (e.g. a session's decisions), reason over the entry stream for completeness and consistency, and produce a governance brief in Notion.
combos.notes: ledger/list_entries from apps/ledger-mcp (enabled:false). thinking and notion are verified live.

prompts.text: Search the evidence store for everything about the closing disclosure and write me a Notion brief
Triage the open issues in the ch1tty repo and put a prioritized backlog in Notion
Find the compliance skill, run it, and log the result on the project's Notion page
Which ChittyID context should serve this session? Evaluate candidates and archive the decision
Find the agent that handles Cloudflare DNS and route my zone-list request to it, then document the result
Search the evidence corpus for prior art and open a GitHub issue citing what you found
List the available AutoRAG vector stores
Search my Notion workspace for the governance charter
Capture this governance decision as a task, log it to the session, and ingest the rationale as a canonical evidence document
Audit all active sessions and their events, then write a session report in Notion
Search evidence for this topic, create action tasks from the findings, and lock the decision in the ledger
Review the governance ledger for this session and write a brief summarizing all decisions

design.description: Browser rendering, automation, and desktop/visual work — now extended with ChittyEvidence (chittyevidence) for canonical archival of visual artifacts, and ChittyAgent Tasks (tasks-mcp) for turning design findings into tracked work items. Verified-strong: browser-rendering, playwright, fs all live. New-backend combos (chittyevidence, tasks) are verified:false.

combos.name: capture-archive-document
combos.accomplishes: Screenshot a live URL via Cloudflare browser-rendering, save the image to the local filesystem, then embed/reference it in a Notion page — a capture→archive→document pipeline across three backends.
combos.notes: browser-rendering, fs, notion all connected. fs/write_file verified present on the filesystem server.

combos.name: visual-bug-report
combos.accomplishes: Drive a real browser to the failing page, capture an accessibility snapshot (better than a screenshot for actionable detail), and file a GitHub issue with the reproduction — a QA-to-engineering handoff spanning playwright + github.
combos.notes: playwright and github connected.

combos.name: page-to-markdown-archive
combos.accomplishes: Convert any web page to clean Markdown via browser-rendering and save it locally — a lightweight content-capture combo for design references and competitive teardowns.
combos.notes: browser-rendering and fs connected.

combos.name: form-fill-and-screenshot-proof
combos.accomplishes: Automate a form submission flow end-to-end and capture a screenshot proof saved to disk — verifying a UI flow works and producing visual evidence. (playwright-heavy, but fs makes the artifact durable cross-backend.)
combos.notes: playwright and fs connected. Mostly single-backend; included because the fs persistence is the cross-backend value.

combos.name: live-page-html-to-docs
combos.accomplishes: Fetch a live page's raw HTML, cross-reference the framework/library it uses against current docs via context7, and write an implementation note into Notion — useful for reverse-engineering a design pattern.
combos.notes: browser-rendering, context7, notion all connected.

combos.name: screenshot-to-canonical-evidence
combos.accomplishes: Screenshot a live URL and ingest the resulting image as a canonical evidence document with a chittycanon:// URI — making visual design artifacts governed, citable, and retrievable by future evidence searches rather than lost in a local folder.
combos.notes: browser-rendering is verified live. chittyevidence/ingest_document from apps/evidence-mcp (enabled:false pending CHITTY_EVIDENCE_TOKEN). The combo promotes ephemeral screenshots into governed design artifacts.

combos.name: browser-test-to-task
combos.accomplishes: Drive a live browser to a design target, capture an accessibility snapshot revealing the actual DOM state, and immediately create a tracked ChittyAgent task for any issues found — a direct QA-to-task pipeline that skips the GitHub issue detour when the issue is design/UX rather than engineering.
combos.notes: playwright is verified live. tasks/create_task from apps/tasks-mcp (enabled:false). Shortest cross-backend design-to-work-tracking combo.

prompts.text: Screenshot chitty.cc, save it locally, and add it to my Notion design board
Open the broken checkout page in a browser, snapshot it, and file a GitHub bug with the repro
Convert the competitor's pricing page to markdown and save it to my references folder
Test the signup form on staging and save a screenshot proving it submits
Grab the HTML of this landing page, check what UI framework it uses, and write up an implementation note in Notion
Take a full-page screenshot of my portfolio site
Screenshot this design URL and ingest it as a canonical evidence document with a chittycanon:// URI
Navigate to the staging site, snapshot the design, and create a tracked task for any issues found
